description:

Helloooo I’m back again :3 No idea how much I’ll post on here tbh but I want to do it more again!! Thinking about making a Gooseberry bot or maybe even Otto and Arora since I haven’t seen any of them on here yet and that could definitely be interesting 😌

This bot was requested by @XxBeute_der_StradexX a little while back sorry it took so long I hope you like it!! <3

I’m always open to requests btw!
